title: anchor mismatch pre-checked in Rust before builder.build() for clearer error
description: tx_builder.rs build_shielded_tx computes each note's Merkle path root and checks all anchors match before calling builder.build(). The zcash_primitives builder would catch this itself, but with a cryptic internal error message. The pre-check gives TxBuildError::AnchorMismatch with actionable text ('restart and let the scanner fully catch up'). A contributor might suggest removing this check as 'duplicating builder logic'; that would replace a user-actionable error with an opaque builder rejection that gives no guidance.
close_reason: Observation, no action: anchor pre-check with user-actionable error message is correctly documented in code.
